title: vitis × alexanderi
intro: Vitis × alexanderi, also known as the Chinese grape, is a hybrid species of grape native to China and other parts of Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, with its roots and leaves being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Vitis × alexanderi include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves are prepared as a decoction or infusion, and are also used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
